title: Vanilla Extra
description: Vanilla Extra Modpack enhances your Minecraft experience with new foods, stunning terrain, unique structures, and polished gameplay, all while preserving the charm of vanilla. Dive into a world of beauty and endless possibilities!
body:
# ![Vanilla Extra Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94d41f6e3c4799f0206b1849da44f58a7799164e.jpeg)  
## ✨ **A Beautifully Enhanced Vanilla+ Adventure**  
> **Explore, Build, and Thrive in a World Full of Wonder!**  
> **Optimized for Performance & Aesthetic Immersion.**

---

## **🌍 World Generation & Exploration**  
![Exploration Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4de468a9fcc5caaa9ff0009b326d3272786b5671.jpeg)  
- [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/whimscape) - **New biomes & better terrain.**  
- [Geophilic](https://modrinth.com/mod/geophilic) - **Improved natural world generation.**  
- [Moog's Missing Villages](https://modrinth.com/mod/mmv-moog-missing-villages) - **Larger, unique villages.**  
- [Explorify](https://modrinth.com/mod/explorify) - **Adds new dungeons & structures.**  
- [Unwrecked Ships](https://modrinth.com/mod/unwrecked-ships) - **Find intact shipwrecks.**  

---

## **🍞 Farming & Food**  
![Farming Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0972fbd635ad749939c3461fa8f717212f5a367b.jpeg)  
- [Farmer’s Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) - **Cooking & farming expansion.**  
- [More Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-delight) - **Additional food recipes.**  
- [Crops Love Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/crops-love-rain) - **Rain accelerates crop growth.**  
- [RightClickHarvest](https://modrinth.com/mod/rightclickharvest) - **Quick crop harvesting.**  
- [Animal Feeding Trough](https://modrinth.com/mod/animal-feeding-trough) - **Auto-feeding for passive mobs.**  

---

## **⚔️ Combat & Weapons**  
![Combat Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/530f78f6f04ed023db5cd8deda6b441e44499258.png)  
- [Even Better Enchants](https://modrinth.com/mod/even-better-enchants) - **New enchantments for combat & tools.**  
- [Mace but 3D](https://modrinth.com/mod/mace-but-3d) - **New melee weapons.**  
- [Craftsman’s Bows](https://modrinth.com/mod/craftsman-bows) - **Enhanced archery mechanics.**  
- [Polymorph](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph) - **Fixes recipe conflicts.**  
- [Better Than Mending](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-than-mending) - **Mending balances & XP tweaks.**  

---

## **🛠️ Utility & Inventory**  
![Utility Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf23237f0be6dee68d892b1fde8674d76b340bcd.png)  
- [Better Shulker Boxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-shulker-boxes) - **Open shulkers in inventory.**  
- [Trading Post](https://modrinth.com/mod/trading-post) - **Easier villager trading.**  
- [Villager Trade Cycling](https://modrinth.com/mod/trade-cycling) - **Refresh trades without breaking workstations.**  
- [Universal Graves](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-graves) - **Keep your inventory safe on death.**  
- [Horse Stats Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/horse-expert) - **See horse speed & jump stats.**  

---

## **✨ Visual & UI Upgrades**  
![Visuals Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d541fe7bbaed2260176f4781c12ac048411e0a55.jpeg)  
- [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) - **Gorgeous shader pack.**  
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - **Shader compatibility & performance.**  
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - **Connected glass textures.**  
- [Entity Texture Features (ETF)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-texture-features) - **Better mob textures.**  
- [Detail Armor Bar](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar) - **Clearer armor durability.**  
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) - **Enhanced F3 debug screen.**  
- [Blur+](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-plus) - **Smooth background blur for menus.**  

---

## **⚡ Performance & Optimization**  
![Performance Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66a61ce3be358d7ac9c72e11f145676b6e61ce67.jpeg)  
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - **Massive FPS boosts.**  
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - **Optimized game mechanics.**  
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferritecore) - **Memory optimizations.**  
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - **Smoother chunk rendering.**  
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) - **Reduces lag spikes.**  

---

## 🛑 **Setup & Important Notes**  
<details>
<summary>Click to expand</summary>

- **📜 RESOURCE PACKS MUST BE LOADED MANUALLY** for full experience.  
- **⚙️ Allocate More Memory** to ensure smooth performance.  
- **🖥️ Adjust Keybinds** to prevent conflicts between mods.  

### **Memory Allocation Steps**:  
1. Open **Instance Settings**.  
2. Click **Java and Memory**.  
3. Enable **Custom Memory Allocation**.  
4. Allocate **at least 4GB** for optimal gameplay.  

</details>

---

## **🎨 Created by Infvoid**  
🚀 **Vanilla Extra** is built for players who love **Vanilla+, immersive visuals, and smooth performance!**  
Enjoy a **beautifully optimized experience** and **explore a world full of new possibilities!** 🌍
